title: Basic JavaScript Browser History API
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript Browser History API. Focus on implementing history.pushState correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript Browser History API
description: Create a function that uses history.pushState and history.replaceState together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript Browser History API Project
description: Build a small application that applies history.pushState, history.replaceState, popstate event in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript Browser History API
description: The following code has bugs related to history.pushState. Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript Browser History API
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with history.pushState and history.replaceState.
